rule_text: For essential benefit style outpatient access specialist and consultant services require a GP referral through the DHA e-referral process or equivalent approved method.

For Remedy 05: Direct Access to Specialist is provided. No GP referral is required for specialist consultation. Members may visit specialists at clinics and applicable hospitals directly. No referral is needed for emergency cases.
